title: Antarctica
summary: The southern continent the archive ties to a hidden Nazi–extraterrestrial base.
markdown:
**Antarctica** appears in the archive as the site of a hidden base linking human and
extraterrestrial powers. In the February 29, 2020 interview Unimetrix 1 speaks of a "Base
International: extraterrestrial, human, dominated by the Nazi civilisation," describing how
"[Nazi Germany](/lore/nazi-faction/) established a connection with an ET civilisation" in the
far south.

Antarctica is a recurring location in secret-space-program and disclosure narratives, and the
archive draws on that backdrop — connecting the continent to the
[Secret Space Program](/lore/secret-space-program/), the [Reichs](/lore/nazi-faction/), and the
concealed history it says runs beneath public events.

As a place, Antarctica anchors the archive's claim that the map of power is not the visible one —
that some of the twentieth century's most consequential arrangements were made at the edges of
the world.
